Interface ConfigurableIndexDefinitionProvider

All Superinterfaces:
IndexDefinitionProvider, IndexDefinitionRegistry
All Known Implementing Classes:
IndexConfiguration
public interface ConfigurableIndexDefinitionProvider extends IndexDefinitionProvider, IndexDefinitionRegistry
IndexDefinitionProvider that allows registering new IndexDefinition via IndexDefinitionRegistry.
Since:
1.7
Author:
Christoph Strobl
